title: fix: rotate Azure GPT image API keys
author: voodoohop

gist.headline: Fresh Keys for the Image Forge
gist.blurb: Rotated the Azure GPT image API keys to keep our image generation pipelines secure and running smoothly.
gist.summary: Rotated the Azure GPT image endpoints and API keys to a new deployment region.
gist.impact: Ensures continued, uninterrupted access to GPT image models for all users.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee holding a shiny new golden key, flying next to the Monitor Robot who is happily displaying a generated image on its screen, representing the refreshed access to the image models.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot holding a shiny golden key next to a chunky robot with a CRT monitor head displaying a beautiful landscape. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Chunky pixels, warm lighting, lo-fi aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Emotionally warm, nostalgic but beautiful.

image.prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot holding a shiny golden key next to a chunky robot with a CRT monitor head displaying a beautiful landscape. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Chunky pixels, warm lighting, lo-fi aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Emotionally warm, nostalgic but beautiful.
